Belt Guard Fault Detection

Shot Blasting Equipment Safety and Reliability

Home Industries Proof Resources Contact Assets

The Equipment

Industrial shot blasting machines use high-speed belts to propel abrasive particles at metal surfaces for cleaning and finishing. Proper belt tensioning and guarding are essential for safe, efficient operation.

The Problem

A belt guard had begun to loosen, creating dangerous vibration and potential for belt damage. This subtle issue wouldn't be caught by routine visual inspections.

The Detection

Samotics' condition monitoring system detected the loose guard by analyzing changes in the motor's electrical signature:

  • Increased vibration translated to electrical signature changes
  • Irregular torque patterns indicated mechanical looseness
  • Harmonic content revealed the frequency of the vibration

The system alerted operators before the problem could escalate.

The Outcome

Maintenance teams tightened the belt guard promptly, preventing potential belt damage and unsafe operating conditions. This early detection improved both safety and operational reliability.
